selected_realization.hud.accessibility: Color‑blind safe palette and adjustable font size
selected_realization.hud.accessibility_contrast: Contrast ratio ≥ 4.5:1 for all HUD text
selected_realization.hud.animation_feedback: Pulse effect on cash increase, slide effect on turn change
selected_realization.hud.cash_display: Currency formatted with symbol, animated pulse on value change
selected_realization.hud.color_scheme: Dark semi‑transparent background (#00000080) with white text and distinct player accent colors
selected_realization.hud.contextual_adaptation: HUD reduces opacity to 70 % and hides non‑essential elements when a modal is open
selected_realization.hud.data_binding_source: GameState singleton bound to HUD widgets
selected_realization.hud.edge_margins: 20 px margin from all screen edges
selected_realization.hud.iconography: Simple icons: user silhouette, coin, clock
selected_realization.hud.info_hierarchy: Primary: current player, Secondary: cash, Tertiary: turn number
selected_realization.hud.layout_position: Fixed at top‑center with 20 px side margins
selected_realization.hud.layout_zone: Top zone for HUD, bottom zone reserved for action buttons
selected_realization.hud.modularity: Separate widget panels for player, cash, and turn
selected_realization.hud.multiplayer_indicator: Player color strips alongside the player name in the HUD
selected_realization.hud.multiplayer_labeling: Labels show player number (P1, P2…) and name
selected_realization.hud.overlay_behavior: HUD overlays the board but hides when a modal appears
selected_realization.hud.player_identity: Active player name plus color‑coded avatar
selected_realization.hud.player_indicator: Color‑coded circle plus avatar next to the player name
selected_realization.hud.readability: High‑contrast sans‑serif text at minimum 14 pt, scalable
selected_realization.hud.refresh_trigger: Event‑driven updates on onTurnChanged and onCashChanged
selected_realization.hud.responsive_scaling: Scale factor based on 1080p baseline, UI scales proportionally
selected_realization.hud.screen_adaptation: Responsive scaling anchored to screen width, max 90 % width
selected_realization.hud.state_feedback: Animated cash pulse on changes and subtle turn indicator
selected_realization.hud.symmetry_balance: Mirror‑symmetrical layout with player panels evenly spaced left‑right
selected_realization.hud.temporal_cues: Turn number with a thin progress bar
selected_realization.hud.theme_consistency: HUD uses the same color palette, fonts, and style as the rest of the game UI
selected_realization.hud.transparency_opacity: Base 100 % opacity, reduced to 70 % during modal state
selected_realization.hud.turn_counter: Text label ‘Turn X’ with numeric value
selected_realization.hud.typography: Sans‑serif font (Roboto/Open Sans) with bold headings
selected_realization.hud.visual_hierarchy: Current player name largest, cash medium, turn smallest
selected_realization.hud.z_order_stacking: HUD rendered below modal dialogs but above the board
